blocks.text: Read the file Cargo.toml and tell me the package name

<tool_use>
find_file
{"pattern": "Cargo.toml", "path": "/home/bellman/Workspace/clawd-code"}
</tool_use>

Let me find the relevant Cargo.toml file(s) in the project.

<tool_use>
bash
{"command": "find /home/bellman/Workspace/clawd-code -name 'Cargo.toml' -maxdepth 4 | head -20"}
</tool_use>

<tool_use>
read_file
{"file_path": "/home/bellman/Workspace/clawd-code/rust/Cargo.toml"}
</tool_use>

<tool_use>
read_file
{"file_path": "/home/bellman/Workspace/clawd-code/rust/crates/rusty-claude-cli/Cargo.toml"}
</tool_use>

Here are the Cargo.toml files found:

1. **Workspace root** (`rust/Cargo.toml`) — This is a virtual workspace manifest (no `[package]` section). It lists members:
   - `crates/rusty-claude-cli`
   - `crates/rusty-claude-core`

2. **CLI crate** (`rust/crates/rusty-claude-cli/Cargo.toml`) — The package name is:

   > **`rusty-claude-cli`** (version `0.1.0`)
